title: Ashmūn Heat Wave
lead: Ashmūn is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.91. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ashmūn has resulted in a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 16.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 18%, but the wind speed of 15.3 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the high temperatures.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
